summary: FXIFY scored 90/100 with flexible account options across MT4, MT5, DXTrade, and TradingView. FXIFY now offers seven programme types — Instant Funding, Lightning, One Phase, Two Phase, Three Phase, plus the new Crypto Instant Funding and Crypto Standard (1 Step). The crypto programmes feature 80+ crypto assets, up to 100% performance split on eligible plans, and crypto-specific rules including a 25% consistency rule and 5:1 leverage on BTC/ETH/SOL. For the main evaluation accounts (1, 2, and 3 Phase), the first funded payout is on demand after the first successful trade, with subsequent payouts every two weeks. CFD accounts offer raw spreads from 0 pips or commission-free trading, with over 300 symbols across forex, indices, commodities, stocks, and crypto.
pros: Seven programme types including two crypto-only plans
Up to 100% performance split on eligible crypto plans (90% on CFD with add-on)
On-demand first payout for evaluation accounts
TradingView now listed alongside MT4, MT5, and DXTrade
80+ crypto assets on crypto programmes, 300+ symbols on CFD
Active community on Discord with weekly payout proofs
cons: Users report slow payouts on higher-tier accounts
Add-on costs increase total fees for maximum flexibility
TradingView on crypto still coming soon
bestFor: Traders who want flexibility in evaluation types, a growing crypto offering with up to 100% performance split, and the option to choose between raw spreads or commission-free trading across 300+ symbols
notIdealFor: Traders who prioritise detailed cost information, comprehensive educational resources, or who need fully live TradingView crypto integration right now

verdictBlocks.heading: Final Verdict on FXIFY
verdictBlocks.body:
FXIFY has expanded well beyond its original CFD-focused lineup. With the addition of Crypto Instant Funding and Crypto Standard (1 Step), FXIFY now offers seven programme types covering both traditional forex/CFD markets and a dedicated crypto trading path with 80+ crypto assets and up to 100% performance split on eligible plans.

The main evaluation accounts (One Phase, Two Phase, Three Phase) now offer on-demand first payouts after the first successful funded trade, with subsequent payouts available every two weeks. Instant Funding retains its 14-day payout cycle. TradingView is now listed alongside MT4, MT5, and DXTrade across programme pages and purchase flow, though TradingView on crypto is noted as coming soon.

While FXIFY's educational resources remain limited and add-on costs can increase total fees, the breadth of challenge types, market access across 300+ symbols, and the new crypto-specific programmes make it one of the most versatile prop firms available. The crypto programmes introduce their own rules — 25% consistency, 3% daily / 6% max trailing drawdown, no news trading 5 minutes before or after events, and 7-day inactivity limits — so traders should review the specific rules for their chosen programme carefully.

faq.q: Where can I find the best FXIFY deals?
faq.a: You can find the best FXIFY deals on BestPropFirms.com, where we offer exclusive promo codes like PROPFIRMS15 for 15% off all FXIFY challenges.

Yes, FXIFY has a separate futures prop trading firm, FXIFY Futures. This program offers funded futures accounts up to $150K, with a one-step evaluation, TradingView-based charts, and real-time CME data. Unlike FXIFY's CFD-focused challenges, FXIFY Futures is tailored for traders looking to trade futures with transparent pricing and no time limits.

faq.q: Is FXIFY prop trading firm a scam?
faq.a: FXIFY is not considered a scam; it is a registered prop trading firm that offers funded accounts and has numerous verified reviews on platforms like TrustPilot, where it holds a score of 4.4 out of 5. However, some users have reported delays in account activation and withdrawals, particularly on higher-tier accounts.

FXIFY appears safe, providing standard security measures and a community-backed reputation. It has established a presence across social media and TrustPilot, with a majority of positive reviews, especially about their payout processes. FXIFY is backed by FXPIG, a broker licensed by the Vanuatu Financial Services Commission (VFSC).

FXIFY operates through FXPIG, a broker known for supporting prop firms with competitive spreads and fast execution. FXPIG provides trading platforms like MT4, MT5, DXTrade, and TradingView, giving FXIFY traders access to multiple trading environments.

faq.q: What is the profit split on FXIFY?
faq.a: FXIFY's standard profit split on CFD programmes starts at 80% and can be increased to 90% with the profit-split add-on. The new crypto programmes can offer up to 100% performance split on eligible plans. The profit split applies to all funded accounts after passing the evaluation phase (or immediately for Instant Funding accounts).

faq.q: What crypto programmes does FXIFY offer?
faq.a: FXIFY now offers Crypto Instant Funding (no evaluation, 3% daily drawdown, 6% max trailing drawdown, 25% consistency rule) and Crypto Standard 1 Step (9% profit target, 4 min trading days in eval, 7 min trading days funded). Both programmes feature 80+ crypto assets with leverage of 5:1 on BTC/ETH/SOL and 2:1 on other crypto. TradingView on crypto is noted as coming soon.
